The '''Lucin Syndicate''' was a company that was part of the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]]. It was concerned with the manufacture and distribution of illegal [[Pornography|holoporn]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].
